revision.comment: Add lk to Petscan
1 revision imported
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (14 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 14 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}↵" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Maintenance category|container=true|desc=Contains categories whose members should only be in the .}} [https://petscan.wmflabs.org/?outlinks_yes=&language=en&ns%5B8%5D=1&ns%5B15%5D=1&ns%5B118%5D=1&ns%5B10%5D=1&ns%5B13%5D=1&ns%5B2301%5D=1&ns%5B711%5D=1&ns%5B5%5D=1&ns%5B108%5D=1&edits%5Bbots%5D=both&ns%5B101%5D=1&cb_labels_yes_l=1&cb_labels_any_l=1&ns%5B9%5D=1&interface_language=en&categories=Article_namespace_categories&ns%5B100%5D=1&ns%5B2303%5D=1&ns%5B829%5D=1&ns%5B1%5D=1&ns%5B3%5D=1&ns%5B11%5D=1&ns%5B6%5D=1&ns%5B2302%5D=1&edits%5Banons%5D=both&search_max_results=500&ns%5B828%5D=1&depth=19&ns%5B12%5D=1&active_tab=tab_pageprops&ns%5B7%5D=1&ns%5B109%5D=1&ns%5B4%5D=1&ns%5B446%5D=1&ns%5B447%5D=1&ns%5B710%5D=1&cb_labels_no_l=1&ns%5B2%5D=1&ns%5B2300%5D=1&ns%5B119%5D=1&edits%5Bflagged%5D=both&project=wikipedia This Petscan query] can be used to detect any pages in other namespaces.
[[Wikipedia:Main namespace|main namespace]] [[en:Category:Article namespace categories]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Namespace-specific categories]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Maintenance category|container=true|desc=Contains categories whose members should only be in the .}} {{wikidata link|Q65745328}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Article namespace categories]] [[Wikipedia:Main namespace|main namespace]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Namespace-specific categories]]

<!--templates--> {{Maintenance category|container=true|desc=Contains categories whose members should only be in the .}} {{wikidata link|Q65745328}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Article namespace categories]] [[Wikipedia:Main namespace|main namespace]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Namespace-specific categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]
